name: Tyrant's Tantrum
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>暴</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぼう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>君</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>くん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>暴</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぼう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>力</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りょく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Activate by Tributing 2 monsters. Your opponent cannot activate a Spell Card unless they also send 1 Spell Card from the Deck to the Graveyard.
eff: Activate by Tributing 2 monsters. Your opponent cannot activate a Spell Card unless they also send 1 Spell Card from the Deck to the Graveyard.

action: Must pay cost to activate cards or effects
Sends from your opponent's Deck to your opponent's Graveyard
Sends from your opponent's Deck to your opponent's Graveyard for cost
mst: Prevents activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
